prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock 6.75L L410 V8 (engine code: L410) with a bespoke naturally aspirated 7.0L V12 derived from the Rolls-Royce Phantom VII's N73B68, featuring a billet aluminum block, forged internals (Mahle pistons, Carrillo H-beam rods), and a custom dry-sump oiling system by Aviaid. Pair with a custom intake manifold by Jenvey Dynamics with individual throttle bodies (ITBs) and a MoTeC M190 ECU for precise fuel and ignition mapping.

Forced Induction: Twin Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbochargers with TiAL MV-R 60mm wastegates and TiAL Q 50mm blow-off valves, mounted on a custom stainless steel exhaust manifold by Burns Stainless. Intercooling via a front-mount air-to-water setup with a PWR radiator and Bosch Motorsport water pump, plumbed to a custom ice reservoir for track use.

Suspension & Handling: Full conversion to a custom air-ride system by AccuAir E-Level with dual Viair 480C compressors, paired with a bespoke 3-way adjustable coilover setup by KW Suspensions (specifically engineered for the Corniche's unibody chassis). Front and rear sway bars upgraded to Eibach Pro-Street Sway Bars, with polyurethane bushings by SuperPro for reduced compliance. Braking system overhauled with Alcon 6-piston monoblock calipers (front) and 4-piston calipers (rear), clamping 420mm and 380mm two-piece rotors respectively, with Ferodo DS3000 pads and braided stainless steel lines by Goodridge.
estetica: Bodywork: Full custom widebody conversion by Liberty Walk (LB-WORKS), specifically designed for the Corniche Convertible's proportions, featuring hand-laid carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser. The kit includes a custom 3D-printed front grille insert with a Rolls-Royce Spirit of Ecstasy emblem reimagined in polished titanium by BBS Motorsport.

Wheels & Tires: Custom 22-inch forged wheels by HRE Performance Wheels (model: HRE FF16), with a staggered fitment of 285/30R22 front and 325/25R22 rear tires by Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R. The wheels feature a bespoke center cap with the Rolls-Royce logo inlaid with black diamonds by Graff Diamonds.

Interior & Aero: Full reupholstery in hand-stitched Bridge of Weir leather by Rolls-Royce Bespoke, with Alcantara headliner and carbon fiber trim by V Carbon. Custom rear spoiler by Vorsteiner (carbon fiber, adjustable angle) and a front lip splitter with integrated LED lighting by Diode Dynamics. The interior features a custom roll bar by Heico Sportiv, wrapped in matching leather, with a bespoke infotainment system by Bang & Olufsen Beosound Theatre, integrated into the rear parcel shelf.
